area.value: one willing undead creature per 3 levels, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: This spell functions as rage, except it affects only undead creatures and bolsters them with necromantic energy rather than emotion. Each affected creature gains a +2 profane bonus to Strength and Charisma, a +1 profane bonus on Will saves, and a â2 penalty to AC. The effect is otherwise identical to a barbarian’s rage.
